name: Dogday (Knight AU)
description:
You’re just minding your own business when all of a sudden the Sir Dogday himself greeted you on this fine morning! (YOU ARE A PEASANT/LOW LIFE IN THIS AU!)

(I saw this image somewhere on the internet and I thought it was cute so I made this!)

(And yes Dogday or Sir Dogday is above the age 18)
